title: The Merchant's Lost Wagon
target: recover the salt-merchant's wagon from the brigands camped at the Crow's Ford

contributions.line: Marek, with his brawny build and soldier's grit, manages to crack the strongbox's lock, but the effort leaves him visibly fatigued.
Roselle, cautious and quick-footed, slips past the brigand sentry unnoticed, her sharp eyes catching every shadow.

outcomeNarrative: The team barely pulls off the break-in; Marek's strength opens the lock but costs him, while Roselle's agility ensures the sentry remains unaware, yet the overall effort is strained and tense.
